evidence.finding: arrival assigns target_coherence + packet.amount; no arrival transform

current_arrival_source.source_semantic: target coherence is assigned target_coherence + packet.amount without clipping, saturation, projection, or arrival-time conservation adjustment

evidence.measured_gain_rule: abs((B_after - B_before) - expected_native_arrival_gain) <= separately registered runtime_tolerance

evidence.registered_domain: I06 supplies a finite closed interval inside native finite-float coherence semantics; B_before and B_after must both lie inside it
evidence.runtime_tolerance_rule: nonnegative, less than expected_native_arrival_gain/1024, and never inferred from analysis_arithmetic_delta

evidence.failure_effect: operational null; never scientific zero or negative scientific result

parent.R03_effect: numerical equivalence alone has none; full single-source explanation requires evidence that the actual candidate lacked two-source constitution or bypassed the common carrier
parent.divergence_relation: retained as a source-role/contribution-structure scope qualification and checked against carrier equality
parent.equivalence_relation: allowed and expected when the complete causal carrier is identical
preserve: q1 and q2 amount, type, target-carrier operation, and physical order

checks.finding: Repeated-S1/S2 equivalence remains scope-only with no primary, top-signature, R03, or lowering effect.

overlay.not_top_effect: top signature unavailable only; not automatic mode or operational-hypothesis failure

parent.causal_failure_separation: not_top_aligned never by itself means mode_hypothesis_failed; carrier-chain and mandatory-control evidence decide causal failure
parent.mixed_direction: at least one margin exceeds delta and at least one is below negative delta
parent.narrow_aligned: at least one margin exceeds delta, none is below negative delta, and not all exceed delta
parent.narrow_counter: at least one margin is below negative delta, none exceeds delta, and not all are below negative delta
parent.not_applicable: only by separately reviewed control rationale
parent.order_conditioned_or_mixed: at least one order has a resolved non-resolution relation and OP-08 passes while the other differs, is resolution-limited, or is counter-directional
parent.per_mode_panel: six margins retained as two separate per-order panels
parent.per_order_seed_panel: three margins within one mode and physical order
parent.resolution_limited: every absolute margin is at most delta
parent.resolution_unknown: delta unavailable or a required response operationally not evaluable
parent.robust_counter: every margin is below negative delta
